concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3 - User Story 1 - Generate Yearly Genre Embeddings
concerns.text: Task T010 (Implement src/code/ingest.py function ingest_mpd) and T010b (Log the waiver of Last.fm data ingestion) are listed sequentially, but T010b is a logging action *dependent* on the completion of T010.  Logging the waiver implies MPD ingestion has occurred; therefore, T010b should be a subtask or explicitly stated as dependent on T010.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3 - User Story 1 - Generate Yearly Genre Embeddings
concerns.text: T011 (Implement src/code/ingest.py function fetch_musicbrainz) and T012 (Implement src/code/ingest.py function join_mpd_mb) are listed sequentially, but the description of T012 explicitly states it *depends* on the output of T011 ('join MPD and MusicBrainz data'). This dependency is not reflected in the task order.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3 - User Story 1 - Generate Yearly Genre Embeddings
concerns.text: T013 (Implement src/code/embeddings.py function train_global_word2vec) depends on T012 (join_mpd_mb) to have a normalized metadata table, but the order doesn't explicitly reflect this dependency.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3 - User Story 1 - Generate Yearly Genre Embeddings
concerns.text: T014 (Implement src/code/embeddings.py function aggregate_yearly_embeddings) depends on T013 (train_global_word2vec) to have base track vectors, but the order doesn't explicitly reflect this dependency.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 4 - User Story 2 - Compute & Visualize Temporal Similarity
concerns.text: T019 (Implement src/code/similarity.py to load yearly_embeddings) is listed before T014 (aggregate_yearly_embeddings), which *produces* the `yearly_embeddings` files that T019 depends on. This is a clear producer-consumer violation.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 5 - User Story 3 - Statistically Test Trend & Perform Robustness Checks
concerns.text: T029 (Implement src/code/regression.py function prepare_exclusions) depends on T014 (aggregate_yearly_embeddings) to produce `data/derived/low_coverage_years.json`, but the order doesn't reflect this dependency.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 5 - User Story 3 - Statistically Test Trend & Perform Robustness Checks
concerns.text: T026 (Implement src/code/regression.py function fit_linear_regression) depends on T020 (Save results to data/derived/yearly_similarity.csv), but the order doesn't reflect this dependency.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3 - User Story 1 - Generate Yearly Genre Embeddings
concerns.text: The repeated use of 'Implement [file] function [function name]' is verbose and could be streamlined for better readability (e.g., 'Implement [function name] in [file]'). This isn't a dependency issue, but impacts clarity.
